examples: Yet children, also fearing their parents' punishment and the loss of parental love, come to repress most aggressive impulses.
He burst in, making no effort to repress his fury.
Never repress your emotions, otherwise, they would accumulate and boil over one day.
In any event, you must meet any boredom head-on and not try to avoid or repress it.
We believe that they can do heroic things, so we hand over our money and repress our doubts.
